# saveRecordZones

**Instance Method**

Creates one or more zones in the database.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.RecordZonesResponse, CloudKit.CKError> saveRecordZones(
	CloudKit.ZoneID|CloudKit.ZoneID[]|String|String[] zones
);
```

## Parameters

- **zones**: Possible values are:



## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordZonesResponse] object if the operation succeeds; otherwise, a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Discussion

See [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/ModifyZones.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH10] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240].

## Accessing Record Zones

- **fetchRecordZones**: Fetches one or more zones.
- **fetchAllRecordZones**: Fetches all zones in the database.
- **deleteRecordZones**: Deletes the specified zones.

items.description: Fetches all zones in the database.
